DEFENDANTS' REPLY PAPERS RAISE NEW FACTS REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S INVOLVEMENT IN DRAFTING THE GENTLEMEN'S AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHOULD BE AFFORDED THE OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND. No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants Bridge Brands, Inc., Bridge International Company, Inc., and Michael Litton's Petition to Compel Arbitration and Stay Action is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Continued To Oct-19-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BRIDGE BRANDS, INC., BRIDGE INTERNATIONAL COMPANY, INC., MICHAEL LITTON's Petition To Compel Arbitration is continued to October 19, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302. Defendants' Reply papers raise new facts regarding Plaintiff's involvement in drafting the Gentlemen's Agreement. Plaintiff should be afforded the opportunity to respond. Plaintiff must file and serve any supplemental opposition papers by October 11, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
